name: vmaf_tiny_saliency_student_v1
notes: Fork-trained tiny U-Net (~113K params) trained from scratch on DUTS-TR (Wang et al. 2017, free for academic research). Replaces the smoke-only mobilesal_placeholder_v0 as the recommended weights for the C-side mobilesal extractor. Same I/O contract: ImageNet-normalised RGB NCHW [1,3,H,W] -> saliency map NCHW [1,1,H,W] in [0,1]. Decoder uses ConvTranspose for stride-2 upsampling (Resize is not on the op-allowlist). DUTS images not redistributed in-tree; only the trained weights are. See docs/ai/models/saliency_student_v1.md and docs/adr/0286-saliency-student-fork-trained-on-duts.md.
